from myapp.auth import AuthService
from myapp.db import Database
from myapp.cache import Cache
from myapp.email import EmailService
from myapp.models import User
from myapp.config import Settings

class UserService:
    def __init__(
        self,
        auth: AuthService,
        db: Database,
        cache: Cache,
        email: EmailService,
        settings: Settings,
    ):
        self._auth = auth
        self._db = db
        self._cache = cache
        self._email = email
        self._settings = settings

    def signup(self, data: dict) -> User:
        user = User(**data)
        self._auth.hash_password(user)
        self._db.save(user)
        self._cache.set(f"user:{user.id}", user)
        self._email.send(user.email, "Welcome!")
        return user
